name: topology-rename-alfred
_doc: Rename local /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/AIFred-Pro-Dev → /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/Alfred-Dev. Per Decision 3 of 2026-05-12 topology migration: AIFred-Pro stays as-is (read-only pull-destination); only the -Dev variant gets renamed. Project name 'aifred-pro-dev' is preserved to keep Docker volume + network namespaces intact across the dir rename.

repairs.description: Unload dev event-watcher plist (currently loaded; others weren't per launchctl list)
Rewrite 3 dev plists to point at /Alfred-Dev instead of /AIFred-Pro-Dev
Sed .env file (one comment line per Phase 2.1 audit; ignore if no match)
Reload event-watcher plist with new paths
Informational scan — any remaining AIFred-Pro-Dev refs inside the renamed dir get logged but DO NOT fail the recipe (some tracked archive JSON files contain historical refs per Phase 2.1 audit)

rollback.on_repair_failure: if [ -d /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/Alfred-Dev ] && [ ! -d /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/AIFred-Pro-Dev ]; then mv /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/Alfred-Dev /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/AIFred-Pro-Dev; fi; cd /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/AIFred-Pro-Dev 2>/dev/null && /usr/local/bin/docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml -p aifred-pro-dev up -d
rollback.on_up_failure: if [ -d /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/Alfred-Dev ] && [ ! -d /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/AIFred-Pro-Dev ]; then mv /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/Alfred-Dev /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/AIFred-Pro-Dev; fi; cd /Users/nathanielcannon/Claude/AIFred-Pro-Dev 2>/dev/null && /usr/local/bin/docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml -p aifred-pro-dev up -d
